positive: A stylized and whimsical grouping of various flora and fauna: a majestic Bengal tiger cub playing with oversized tropical foliage, a bioluminescent jellyfish floating beside giant monstera leaves, and a hummingbird sipping nectar from an exotic orchid. The composition should be circular and balanced, featuring clean, highly contrasted silhouettes against a deep teal or midnight blue background. The style must be a blend of Art Nouveau and modern flat design, rendered with rich, saturated colors and clean outlines suitable for apparel printing. Focus on strong, graphic details and clear separation of subjects. Tropical jungle aesthetic, magical, serene, intricate.
